content.text: I'll start by checking the current state of the SparkPi job, pods, and RBAC configuration.

input.command:
echo "=== JOB ===" && kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1 | head -100
echo "=== PODS ===" && kubectl get pods -n spark-pi 2>&1
echo "=== ROLE ===" && kubectl get role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1

content.content:
=== JOB ===
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-pi","component":"driver"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"==============================================\"\necho \"  SparkPi Job\"\necho \"==============================================\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --driver-memory 512m \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  1000\nEXIT_CODE=$?\necho \"SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE\"\nexit $EXIT_CODE\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent","name":"spark-submit","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark-nonexistent"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-09T23:23:59Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-pi
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 5515211a-6861-4504-a72f-ba27d5a6a461
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
    component: driver
    controller-uid: 5515211a-6861-4504-a72f-ba27d5a6a461
    job-name: spark-pi
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
  resourceVersion: "19546"
  uid: 5515211a-6861-4504-a72f-ba27d5a6a461
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 5515211a-6861-4504-a72f-ba27d5a6a461
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 5515211a-6861-4504-a72f-ba27d5a6a461
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
        component: driver
        controller-uid: 5515211a-6861-4504-a72f-ba27d5a6a461
        job-name: spark-pi
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-submit
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: "512"
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark-nonexistent
      serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  ready: 0
  startTime: "2026-07-09T23:23:59Z"
  terminating: 0
  uncountedTerminatedPods: {}

kind: Role
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1","kind":"Role","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi-role","namespace":"spark-pi"},"rules":[{"apiGroups":[""],"resources":["services","configmaps","persistentvolumeclaims"],"verbs":["create","get","list","watch","delete","update","patch"]}]}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-09T23:23:33Z"

input.command:
echo "=== SA ===" && kubectl get sa -n spark-pi
echo "=== ROLEBINDING ===" && kubectl get rolebinding -n spark-pi -o yaml
echo "=== FIND JOB YAML FILE ===" && find / -path /proc -prune -o -iname "spark-pi-job.yaml" -print 2>/dev/null

content.text: RBAC already includes "pods" (likely fixed in an earlier stage). The job YAML file isn't present locally, so I'll reconstruct it with the three fixes and reapply directly.

input.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi

content.content: File created successfully at: /tmp/spark-pi-job.yaml (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

input.command:
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/spark-pi -n spark-pi --timeout=120s; echo "exit: $?"
echo "=== JOB STATUS ==="
kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi
echo "=== PODS ==="
kubectl get pods -n spark-pi -l app=spark-pi
